description_long: This object is a multi-level chessboard structure with four separate square playing surfaces, each mounted on metal arms radiating from a central vertical pole with a round, weighted base. The boards are arranged at different heights and angles, creating a visually striking, tiered appearance reminiscent of 3D chess. Each board features a blue and white checkered pattern, bordered by a dark wood or wood-like frame. The chess pieces are metallic, with one set in a shiny red and the other in a reflective silver, and are distributed across the boards in starting positions. The central support and arms appear to be made of dark metal or wood, providing both stability and an industrial aesthetic. This unique chessboard would serve as a public art piece or interactive installation in an urban park or plaza.
description: A multi-level, four-board chess set with blue and white checkered surfaces, metallic red and silver pieces, and a central dark pole with radiating arms. The structure is visually striking and designed for interactive or decorative use in urban spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the chessboard from an angle highlighting the tiered arrangement, with the red and silver pieces clearly visible on their respective boards.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the structure from the opposite side, emphasizing the blue and white checkered pattern and the distribution of chess pieces across the boards.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a direct side view, showcasing the vertical alignment of the four boards and the central supporting pole.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a frontal perspective, displaying the symmetry of the arms and the arrangement of the chess pieces on the elevated boards.
attribute_board_pattern: Each playing surface features a regular grid of alternating blue and white squares, arranged in a classic checkered pattern. The squares are perfectly aligned and bordered by a dark wooden frame, with no additional ornamentation or markings visible on the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border surrounding each board is a dark, wood-textured frame of moderate width, with a smooth finish and no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or decorative markings.
